runs.synthesis:
# PHASE 6: SYNTHESIS & PRIORITIZED TODO LIST

## PART 1: EXECUTIVE SUMMARY

The Swizzley FX system is in **critical condition** with a devastating 25.68% win rate and -$11.70 total P&L across 553 trades. The analysis reveals a system that is fundamentally broken across multiple dimensions, but with clear pathways to recovery.

**Key Findings**: The scalp timeframe dominates trading volume (98% of trades) but is hemorrhaging money with a -$9.84 loss. However, the recent version deployment (finmon b5698030 + trader 9bd6121f) showed a remarkable **19.23 percentage point improvement** to 35.90% win rate, proving the system can be profitable. Critical risk guardrails are disabled, allowing poor-quality trades to execute unchecked.

**Root Causes**: The scoring system fails to predict profitable trades, with higher scores showing no correlation with better performance. Risk management is severely compromised with spread checks, pip distance limits, and position limits all disabled. The system trades too frequently (15-minute cooldowns) with inadequate R:R requirements (1.5x minimum) for the current win rate.

**Immediate Opportunity**: The latest code version demonstrates the system's potential, but protective measures must be implemented immediately to prevent further losses while optimization continues. The intraday timeframe shows promise (37.50% win rate, +$1.03 P&L) but needs larger sample sizes.

**Strategic Direction**: Focus on protecting and understanding the recent performance improvement while implementing critical risk controls. The system needs immediate defensive measures followed by systematic optimization of the scoring pipeline and risk management framework.

## PART 2: PRIORITIZED TODO LIST

todos.title: Enable Critical Risk Guardrails Immediately
todos.description: Enable spread protection (check.spread.scalp), pip distance limits (check.max_pip_dist.scalp), and position limits (check.max_orders.scalp) to stop hemorrhaging money on poor-quality trades
todos.expected_impact: Reduce trade volume by 60%, improve win rate by 5-10%, reduce average loss by 20%
todos.evidence: Phase 4 shows 74.4% loss rate with disabled guardrails. Spread protection and pip distance checks are fundamental risk controls

todos.title: Increase Minimum R:R Requirement for Scalps
todos.description: Raise check.rr.scalp from 1.5 to 2.0 to achieve breakeven at 33.3% win rate instead of current 25.68%
todos.expected_impact: Reduce unprofitable trades by 30%, improve expected value per trade from -$0.021 to near breakeven
todos.evidence: Current 25.68% win rate with 1.5 R:R creates negative expected value. Mathematical requirement for profitability

todos.title: Reduce Scalp Position Size by 50%
todos.description: Cut order.quantity.scalp from 100 to 50 units to limit losses while system is being optimized
todos.expected_impact: Reduce maximum single trade loss by 50%, limit daily drawdown exposure
todos.evidence: System is losing money consistently. Risk reduction is critical until performance improves

todos.title: Investigate Direction Series Performance Improvement
todos.description: Analyze why finmon commit b5698030 'Add direction series to dashboard JSON' improved win rate by 19.23 percentage points to understand the mechanism
todos.expected_impact: Understand and potentially amplify the most significant performance improvement observed
todos.evidence: Phase 2 shows statistically significant improvement (p=0.0402) from 16.67% to 35.90% win rate with this change

todos.title: Extend Scalp Cooldown Period
todos.description: Increase cooldown.minutes.scalp from 15 to 30 minutes to reduce overtrading and improve trade quality
todos.expected_impact: Reduce trade frequency by 40%, improve trade selection quality, reduce transaction costs
todos.evidence: Current 15-minute cooldown allows 96 potential trades per day. System shows overtrading symptoms

todos.title: Implement Hour-Based Trading Restrictions
todos.description: Restrict scalp trading to profitable hours (4, 6, 15 UTC) and disable trading during worst-performing hours (3, 22 UTC)
todos.expected_impact: Eliminate -$3.87 losses from worst hours, concentrate trading in +$0.92 profitable hours
todos.evidence: Phase 1 shows Hour 15 (+$0.81 P&L), Hours 4&6 (50%+ win rates) vs Hours 3&22 (0% win rates, -$3.87 total)

todos.title: Focus Trading on CAD_HKD and Top Performers
todos.description: Prioritize or exclusively trade CAD_HKD (only profitable symbol +$0.04) and disable worst performers (AUD_CAD, USD_DKK, NZD_USD)
todos.expected_impact: Eliminate -$1.33 losses from worst 3 symbols, concentrate on proven profitable pairs
todos.evidence: Phase 1 shows CAD_HKD is only profitable symbol. AUD_CAD (0% win rate), USD_DKK (9.09%), NZD_USD (10%) are consistent losers

todos.title: Fix R:R Prediction vs Reality Disconnect
todos.description: Investigate why predicted R:R (avg 11.0) has negligible correlation (-0.064) with actual R:R achieved in trades
todos.expected_impact: Improve trade selection accuracy, align expectations with reality, reduce false confidence
todos.evidence: Phase 4 shows predicted R:R 11.0 achieving actual R:R 0.0007. Complete disconnect between scoring and execution

todos.title: Rebalance Scalp Scoring Component Weights
todos.description: Reduce pattern weight from 12% to 0% (like swing), increase trend and MA weights to match swing timeframe proven weights
todos.expected_impact: Improve scoring accuracy by 2-5%, reduce noise from unreliable pattern recognition
todos.evidence: Swing timeframe (0% pattern weight) shows better performance trends. Pattern scoring may be adding noise rather than signal

todos.title: Tighten Slippage Tolerance
todos.description: Reduce check.slippage from 10.0 to 5.0 pips (still 60x the average observed slippage of 0.083 pips)
todos.expected_impact: Prevent execution in extreme market conditions, improve trade quality by 1-2%
todos.evidence: Phase 4 shows average slippage is only 0.083 pips. Current 10-pip tolerance is unnecessarily generous

todos.title: Analyze Intraday Timeframe Scaling Potential
todos.description: Investigate why intraday shows 37.50% win rate and +$1.03 P&L with only 8 trades. Determine if this can be scaled up safely
todos.expected_impact: Potentially shift focus to more profitable timeframe, improve overall system performance by 10-15%
todos.evidence: Phase 1 shows intraday outperforming scalp significantly (37.50% vs 25.60% win rate, positive vs negative P&L)

todos.title: Complete Scoring Pipeline Effectiveness Analysis
todos.description: Finish the incomplete Phase 3 analysis to understand why higher FinalScores don't correlate with better performance
todos.expected_impact: Identify specific scoring components that are counterproductive, guide weight rebalancing
todos.evidence: Phase 1 shows 40-60 FinalScore range has best win rate but still loses money. Scoring system is fundamentally flawed

todos.title: Complete Indicator & Signal Analysis
todos.description: Finish the incomplete Phase 5 analysis to identify which of the 140+ indicators are actually predictive of profitable trades
todos.expected_impact: Optimize indicator selection, reduce computational overhead, improve signal quality
todos.evidence: System computes 140+ indicators but performance is poor. Many indicators may be adding noise rather than signal

todos.title: Implement Version Performance Monitoring
todos.description: Add real-time alerts when win rate drops >5 percentage points after deployments to prevent future regressions
todos.expected_impact: Prevent future performance regressions, enable faster rollbacks, protect profitable versions
todos.evidence: Phase 2 shows massive performance swings between versions (19.23pp improvement, 9.94pp regression)

todos.title: Align Execution with Pips Table Ranges
todos.description: Ensure actual TP/SL distances match the pips table session-based ranges (5-20 pip TP, 5-12 pip SL)
todos.expected_impact: Improve R:R consistency, reduce extreme outliers in SL distances (currently 0.61-209.67 pips)
todos.evidence: Phase 4 shows extreme variance in SL distances. Pips table has reasonable ranges that aren't being respected
